message:
feat(ast,vdbe): extend AST display and engine with generated column and expression improvements

- Add display trait implementation for new AST node variants
- Extend AST lib with additional expression and column definition support
  (27 lines of new functionality)
- Improve VDBE engine handling for edge cases in expression evaluation
  and generated column computation (22 lines changed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
